title: UTAUT Framework and User Acceptance Evaluation
paragraphs: The researchers used the UTAUT model (Venkatesh et al., 2003) to evaluate acceptance of the OSAS Web-Based Student Management System (WBSMS) at Legacy College of Compostela.
User Acceptance Testing involved 50 respondents who were actual users of the deployed WBSMS.

table_7_6_constructs.caption: Table 7.6. UTAUT Constructs and Definitions
rows: The degree to which the user believes that using the system will help them achieve gains in job performance.
Usefulness, efficiency, productivity improvement in OSAS tasks
The degree of ease associated with the use of the system.
Ease of use, learnability, clarity of interface
The degree to which the user perceives that important others believe they should use the system.
Peer influence, supervisory support, institutional norms
The degree to which the user believes that organizational and technical infrastructure exists to support system use.
The extent to which users intend to use the system in the future.
Willingness to recommend, continued use intention
